personal.preferred_title: Dynatrace Observability Lead | APM, Dashboards & Operational Readiness

summary: Dynatrace and APM observability lead with enterprise experience supporting monitoring platforms, telemetry pipelines, dashboards, alert thresholds, and operational reporting across financial-services and compliance-heavy environments. Hands-on background with Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics, CA APM, BMC TrueSight, AppDynamics, EUM/RUM, transaction tracing, and Python/shell automation. Experienced coordinating monitoring upgrades, standardizing dashboards and alerts, and enabling application and infrastructure teams through documentation, training, and cross-team collaboration.

experience.title: Senior Observability & Capacity Engineering Lead
bullets: Supported enterprise observability and capacity monitoring across 6,000+ endpoints using BMC TrueSight/TSCO telemetry, reporting workflows, and operational dashboards.
Integrated monitoring feeds from TrueSight, CA Wily, and AppDynamics into unified reporting layers that improved operational visibility and stakeholder decision-making.
Built Python/Pandas telemetry pipelines to automate ingestion, transformation, and reporting of performance data, reducing manual operational effort.
Developed dashboards, capacity reports, and baseline trend analysis used by infrastructure, operations, and leadership teams to monitor reliability and plan remediation.
Partnered with application, infrastructure, and operations teams to support monitoring adoption, reporting consistency, and operational readiness in a regulated financial-services environment.

experience.title: Performance Engineer / Dynatrace Monitoring Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and other critical production systems.
Implemented End-User Monitoring (EUM) and transaction tracing across web and mobile platforms to improve application visibility and issue diagnosis.
Led Dynatrace 6.5 to 7.0 upgrade with TLS 1.2 enforcement and zero production monitoring regression.
Analyzed Gomez Synthetic Monitoring and real-user performance metrics through the FAST project, delivering optimization recommendations adopted by engineering teams.

experience.title: CA APM SME / Senior Consultant
bullets: Managed enterprise CA APM environments with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents across distributed systems.
Led major CA APM upgrade initiatives from 9.1 to 10.1 with zero unplanned downtime while coordinating across cross-functional IT teams.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and Management Modules that became monitoring standards across client environments.
Built Perl/Korn Shell automation scripts for recurring telemetry extraction, reporting, and operational documentation.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: FAST Project
projects.description: Led telemetry analysis using Dynatrace and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring to identify performance optimization opportunities for critical production systems and improve operational visibility for engineering teams.

projects.name: HorizonScale — Capacity & Telemetry Analytics Platform
projects.description: Developed telemetry analytics workflows and dashboards supporting capacity forecasting, operational reporting, and infrastructure visibility across large-scale enterprise systems.
